title: ChromadbAssetComponent
description: Read documents from a relational database, generate OpenAI embeddings, and upsert them into a ChromaDB collection as a Dagster asset.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

chroma_port.description: Port of the ChromaDB HTTP server.

chroma_api_key_env_var.description: Env var containing the Chroma Cloud API key.

collection_name.description: ChromaDB collection to get-or-create and upsert documents into.

database_url_env_var.description: Env var containing a SQLAlchemy-compatible source database URL.

source_table.description: Source table to read documents from. Accepts schema.table or bare table.

id_column.description: Primary key column. Values are used as ChromaDB document IDs.

text_column.description: Column containing the document text to embed.

metadata_columns.description: Additional columns to store as ChromaDB document metadata.

openai_api_key_env_var.description: Env var containing the OpenAI API key.

batch_size.description: Documents per OpenAI API request and ChromaDB upsert batch.
